zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Christian Halle於大約1436年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親John Hall33歲，母親Joan30歲。她於大約1469年與Sir Thomas Hungerford在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1504年7月31日在英國格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼享年69歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Christian Halle于大约1436年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲John Hall33岁，母亲Joan30岁。她于大约1469年与Sir Thomas Hungerford在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1504年7月31日在英国格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼享年69岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Halle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Rejean, Marcel, Andre, Arianne, Armand, Camille, Fernand, Gaspard, Laurent.
German and English: variant of   Hall  .
French (also Hallé): topographic name from Old French halle ‘covered market’, from halla ‘covered room’.

variants.name: Hall
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, German, Norwegian, and Danish: from Middle English hall (Old English heall), Middle High German halle, Old Norse hǫll all meaning ‘hall’ (a spacious residence), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in or near a hall or an occupational name for a servant employed at a hall. In some cases it may be a habitational name from any of the places called with this word, which in some parts of Germany and Austria in the Middle Ages also denoted a salt mine. Hall is one of the commonest and most widely distributed of English surnames, bearing witness to the importance of the hall as a feature of the medieval village. The English surname has been established in Ireland since the 14th century, and, according to MacLysaght, has become numerous in Ulster since the 17th century.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from hall ‘hall’ (a spacious residence), or a habitational name from a placename containing the element hall ‘rock’ (from Old Norse hallr).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 何 and 賀, see   He   1 and 2.

variants.name: Hallee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Armand, Fernand, Henri, Napoleon, Renald, Urbain.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Christian Halle was born about 1436, in England, United Kingdom, her father, John Hall, was 33 and her mother, Joan, was 30. She married Sir Thomas Hungerford about 1469, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 31 July 1504, in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Christian Halle est née environ 1436, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hall, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Hungerford environ 1469, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 31 juillet 1504, à Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Christian Halle um 1436 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hall 33 und ihre Mutter Joan 30. Sie hat um 1469 in Gloucestershire, England Sir Thomas Hungerford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 31. Juli 1504 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christian Halle è nata il circa 1436 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Hall, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Joan, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Hungerford circa 1469, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 31 luglio 1504, nel Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Christian Halleが約1436年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父John Hallは33歳，母Joanは30歳であった。約1469年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでSir Thomas Hungerfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1504年7月31日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダウン アンプニーで69歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアシアーエンセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Christian Halle(이)가 대략 1436년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hall(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1469년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Sir Thomas Hungerford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 7월 31일 영국 그루스스터실르 다운 아p니에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 시렌스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christian Halle nasceu aproximadamente 1436, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Hall, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Hungerford aproximadamente 1469, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 31 de julho de 1504, em Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Christian Halle родилась около 1436 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Hall было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Hungerford около 1469 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 31 июля 1504 г. в местности доун ампни, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Thomas Hungerford aproximadamente 1469, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 31 de julio de 1504, en Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
